reviews.review_text: Great spot. Jetty could do with some TLC though
What an awesome experience Clean facillities,Beautifull nature  and affordable ,amazing frendly staff

A lovely find for a night's stop on our way to Q'land. Only a short detour from the Princes Hwy - perfect.
The lady at reception was friendly & efficient, our cabin clean & comfortable.
Not far for dinner to the local RSL where meals were superb.
I have already recommended Big 4 Karuah to friends who travel north!
Great BIG4. Nice powered sites and friendly neighbours in the long term sites. Amazing fishing. Thanks!
We had a great time here with the family.We can't wait to come back
Lovely park we only had 1 night but we went for a walk around and down to the jetty. Very clean and tidy, caters for everyone and we'll stay again but longer.
Very good

The experience was all good, the staff were friendly and helpful and the park was very clean. My only complaint is I thought it a bit much charging for dogs, this is the first time we have struck this charge at any park we have stopped at.

Staff is very friendly and site quite nice, but vastly overpriced. The flush buttons in one of the ladies' toilets was gone and I had to use my finger to flush. Then I couldn't leave the toilet because the door was jammed. I had to read some instructions how to open the door. For $80 per night, this lack of minor maintenance is beyond pathetic. Would not recommend the caravan park.

I think for the price the site was pretty poor.|No sullage drain.|Blocks very small and uneven.|2026 no wifi.|Moss Vale was a lovely town with plenty of sites around Bowral etc|But unfortunately we wouldn’t stay again.

We stay overnight on our way uo North and on the way back, drive throughs are great friendly and accommodating staff clean facilities.|We have dinner at the RSL chinese is great best we have had  we are not fans of chinese highly recommend it .

On Suite Sites are to small we told reception before arrival of our van size and had to move sites to accommodate our van 3 times  the shower in the ensuite is way to small and then they but a shower caddy in there witch makes it even smaller
The ensuite sites are located to far away from the pool even though you pay xtra
If I could work from here all the time I would. Such a beautiful place and service on check in was fantastic, very much set the tone for a perfect trip in the friendliest little town.
Great Park this one, plenty of grass and large concrete caravan sites with all amenities
Fantastic caravan park! The cabin was spotless, large and modern for a reasonable price. The staff were friendly and helpful, the pool & other facilities were great too. Hghly recommend.
Great park, just off the highway. Nice and clean. Stayed on Large Concrete Powered Site, could fit car and van. Not cramped on top of each other. Amenities clean. Pool clean. Staff very nice

Terrible overnight drive through site!|Almost like an after thought, we will put them there!|Overpriced and disappointing site compared to what seemed to be available in the park. Obviously overnight stays aren’t welcome or encouraged to extend their stay or want to return.
캠퍼밴 en-suite에서 일박함. 시설들이 깨끗하고 여유로움. 한가지 아쉬운건 쿡탑이 없음. 조금만 걸으면 바로 강까지 이동가능함

Overall it was a great place to stay. The only reason for 4 stars is because the sites we booked 10 months in advance have turned from grass sites to concrete sites with no communication given in advance. We found out on the day we arrived. No issues for those with Caravans but we came with tents. Reception managed to rearranged to fit us in to a different site, although the resolution wasn't the best but better than sending us home on day one simply because there is no way we can setup our tents on solid grounds.

Note: This camp ground is more designed for Caravans for those who plans to visit. I think they are planning to add more slabs in also in the future.

Update: The resolution from the team has yet satisfied our expectations with regards to the compensation we are expected to receive. We have been following up multiple times but end up been redirected. We were told the refund has been made during our stay but still nothing happened 3 weeks down the track. Disappointed to have rated high on service. Bringing it down for this reason.
I can only say great things about this park. A lovely park with great service & amenities.  The staff are so helpful & lovely. Thanks for a wonderful experience Karuah Jetty Holiday Park

Its a alright park that needs some improvement. The pool needs to be cleaned more regularly. They need another pool or a bigger one, it's very busy, crowded there. Also, our cabin was a bit unhinged. Doors wouldn't close properly, they were very loud. They need a updated play area. More under cover areas are needed when it's hot/raining etc. It's a bit expensive. They haven't updated or upgraded or improved anything there in the past few years. The holiday activities are okay, the fishing off the jetty is nice.

Service from the front desk, cleaners handyman was great, always friendly. The town had the basics and a few takeaway places which was handy.

Room was clean and had everything you need. Door lock was a bit dodgy and needed tightening.

A lot of people had trouble accessing the pool through the locked gate. Wouldn't accept codes, that was super annoying for us and we witnessed the same with other families.

The kids little playgroud in the pool was amazing BUT absolutely freezing. My toddler didn't want to be in there on  37 degree day, the main pool was fine.

Overall experience was positive. We booked during peak times as a last minute thing. I probably wouldn't book here again just due to location, it was a fair drive to activities we wanted to do and found ourselves in or close to Nelson Bay.

Stayed in the delux cabin, it was well kept, close to the pool and jumping pillow. It was equipped well but unfortunately had no tongs or scissors for basic cooking. Pans could be bigger as we were cooking for a family of 5 with a tiny fry pan ( had to cook in batches) but overall the grounds were kept clean, the bins always emptied and the service was great.

Unfortunately some of the locals from the private part of the park were causing trouble - especially around the pool area. Not once but twice did I witness guest staying interact with them multiple times about their foul language used around toddlers and other small children and throwing each other into the pool and near missing small children swimming with their families. Sometimes was so bad that myself and my child left the pool early just to avoid them. I feel like the pool could be monitored more by park employees and remove those causing problems for others. Park rules also disclose no pool access after 8pm yet all 6 nights I was there these locals were still in the pool swearing and being silly with one another. Also went to the bouncing pillow to see that someone had "tagged" all over it with texter. If this was monitored more this probably would not have happened. Just very disappointed in that aspect of things.

We know the Port Stephen’s area well and we were aware that in making our booking late and it being Xmas holidays we did well to get in to this park . |It’s in a quiet area and if you’re into fishing then it’s likely the place for you , however we found the access to the water for kids and kayaks to be non existent. We had to drive out of the park to other locations for any water sport fun with kids ! |Out of the parks control but you can’t rely on any of the limited local shops being open other than the IGA. The baker was closed for the entire 10 days we were there and go figure the day we leave it’s open . The butcher was open and closed erratic hours so not reliable even the guy at the IGA was confused and hadn’t ordered enough meat to compensate for the butcher being closed . |The local RSL food wasn’t bad but here’s a tip they serve the entree and main all at once 🤷🏼‍♀️go figure and as they deliver multiple plates to your table they announce we don’t serve entrees seperate! |We wouldn’t have ordered an entree if it wasn’t actually an entree ! |The nearest beach ( Jimmys is great for families but it’s over a half hour drive away or back into the Nelson Bay Area is close to 45 minutes drive . ||The park has some good facilities for kids / family’s but they need some improvements. The jumping pillow is huge but sadly completely out in the weather so the kids could only go on it very late in the afternoon as the surface was scorching hot , same with the pool it has a sunshade only over the toddler area otherwise your exposed. |We were  family in 2 vans , booked drive through sites so we could set up facing each other .However what was omitted when we discussed these sites with the management at the time we booked was the fact they are not in fact grass drive through sites at all . They were totally gravel and dirt and on a slope . |Just hideous . |There is no transparency on dirt / gravel sites at all on the website or when you call , which we feel is pretty deceptive. It was a constant battle keeping the gravel and dirt from tracking onto our expensive flooring which also ended up with a hole in it from the sharp edges of gravel underneath it . |We felt pretty ripped off when we took a walk around after we set up to see mostly all the other sites were either grass / fake grass or concrete and we got a crappy site that we paid the same price for our as the customers on these sites paid . |On top of that we were right amongst the long term people who some had dogs that barked and whined from early   morning every day . We didn’t feel like we were on a holiday park at all being    situated amongst these sites. |We left our dogs with boarders as we know that all parks policies are dogs can’t be left unattended in your van . Well that was a joke as that’s exactly what all the campers with dogs were doing , barking dogs going constantly and we heard people screaming at them to shut up . |We were also excited for the planned holiday kids activities which fyi we only found out about by going over the website. There was mention of facilities or activities when we arrived at all  ! |Day 2 after seeing kids craft on   schedule we take them down to the designated area to find no one there , we wait and go back thinking they might be a little late . Nope no activity, we didn’t bother with that again ! |Overall not a bag park but room for improvement and they definitely need to be honest in the site descriptions as this was a very major disappointment. We are now up for a replacement to our new  flooring or try to repair the hole in it . Would never ever have booked or paid what we did for a dirty gravel site ! |Manager please don’t respond saying you told us of the sites surfaces or you appreciate the feedback as you are fully aware you should be telling your customers what the condition of a site is when it isn’t as advertised either concrete or grass ! As another reviewer has said you shouldn’t be charging as you are for these crappy sites . |$1200 for 9 nights in a dirty gravel site  for 2 people is  outrageous and unacceptable !

They gave me a very bad experience. On December 5th, 2025, the day of the devastating fires on the east coast of New South Wales, they messaged me, and I agreed to cancel my order. Over the phone, they promised a full refund and asked, "Are you happy with that?"... A month later, I called them because I still hadn't received my refund. Unexpectedly, they changed their minds and refused to refund. After arguing, they only agreed to refund 50%... Although the amount wasn't large, it was one of the Big 4 companies I'd trusted for years, and I couldn't accept this...
適合短暫休息的地方，渡假小屋很新、很乾淨，很靠近Jetty. Jumping pillow在維修，無法使用。網路不強。可以看到很多可愛的小兔子🐰

Great park, but spoilt because the last few days all we can hear is he thump thump of someone's 'music' all through the park and nothing has been done about it. So inconsiderate and disappointing management have done nothing as there is no way they cannot hear it too.

This is by far the worst holiday park I have ever stayed at — without exception.

The kitchen facilities are extremely limited and poorly maintained. The Wi-Fi signal is basically unusable, and there is almost no mobile phone reception either, making it very difficult to stay connected at all.

There are very few entertainment facilities for children, which was a big disappointment for a family stay. The outdoor BBQ area is clearly not cleaned or maintained — the grills were dirty and the heat output was extremely weak.

The room was also not properly cleaned. When we arrived, there were popcorn pieces still inside the bed sheets, which clearly shows the bedding had not been changed or cleaned at all. This is completely unacceptable.

On top of that, there are no nearby restaurants or dining options, which makes the poor facilities on site even more frustrating.

Overall, this was a very unpleasant stay and I would not recommend this place to anyone.
Management & Staff at Karauh BIG 4 , exceptional service, very clean , if your travelling North , South or in-between,this is the place to stopover, close to services
Great spot just a few kms from the highway , good fishing, long jetty, plenty of sight seeing in the area

Booking process and Reception process undertaken with ease and staff were polite and efficient.|Amenities were well serviced and always clean (stayed 3 nights in total).|Very quiet day and night.|The "negative" - drive thru sites have no concrete pad, are mainly dirt with small grassed area on some (certainly not the grassed sites shown in pictures), power  water and sullage services are located on LHS of some sites meaning you have to lay hose etc thru the vans Annex area.|Drive thru sites are very slopey - negating the prime reason many caravan need book them - they do not wish to have to unhitch etc. Again the website fails to identify the slope!|And then there is the issue of tenants on long stay sites driving thru the vacant space between drive thru sites ....

I have stayed here on multiple occasions now with my young family and it has become a favourite spot of ours. The location is very peaceful, the accommodation and facilities are great and the service goes above and beyond. From setting up a portable cot for us to facilitating an unexpectedly longer stay (during the floods earlier this year) I have always felt well looked after. Would highly recommend and we are already planning our next stay there 😊

Very quiet and secluded park. The amenities were clean and well looked after.
The jetty was old and rickety, but a pleasant walk, and long.
We stayed 4 nights in our van.

Good spot and park rooms are clean and spacious.
Amenities are cleaned along with BBQ areas
Nice little getaway with the pups..room was good but the bathroom was a little small ..ok for a couple of nights ..visited Tea Gardens each day which was great ..

The weather was not the kindest it could have been but we still enjoyed our little break , everything we used ie amenities , bbq's etc were spotless as usual. The fishing was excellent with some beautiful eating fish caught and eaten, nothing wasted.

Very relaxing,clean and comfortable. Short drives to explore surrounding areas.Beautiful chinese food at the RSL,a short walk away.Fantastic river views.Very cleas BBQ areas.Plenty to keep kids entertained.

A nice holiday park with big caravan sites and a lot of cabins
A lot of sports spaces, pool, tennis court, basketball hoop, beach volleyball court as well as quite a few kids facilities
Nice camp kitchen and a coffee cart
There is also a jetty where I saw people catching fish

Great price for two nights away
Extremely clean accommodation
Nice an quiet

We stayed in a caravan on a powered site, so can't rate the rooms.
Amenities were great, especially the pool and jumping pillow. Jetty was great for an arvo walk too.
Only downside were the sandflies, that seemed to be addicted to me. Still itchy 2 weeks later 😔
Stayed here a few times, great park and facilities. Bus available to take you to the nearby club for a lovely Chinese dinner, or a short walk on a nice night
Good Park off the main drag between Sydney & Brisbane

Couldn’t recommend it enough, perfect for me and my pug to enjoy a night in a cabin. 30 min drive to the main beach but everything in this area is so definitely worth it. Will 100% be back thank you so much guys

Usual Big 4 extras for kids along with the standard amenities. Reasonable price for powered grass site. After recent rains the plastic grass netting is exposed, so be careful not to trip on it. The amenities are clean, though might face a queue in busy periods. Nice place, quiet (albeit the noise of children you'd expect) and friendly. Easy walk to Jetty. Didn't spot nearby shops, but wasn't looking.

Super schöner moderner Campingplatz am See. Hier gab es einen kleinen Spielplatz für Kinder und eine Luftkissen sowie einen Tennisplatz mit einem Basketballkorb. Außerdem wird der Platz weiter renoviert und wir hatten ein super Angebot für 3 Nächte mit Strom mit unserem Motorhome. 66 AUD für alles mit Duschen und Nutzung einer kleinen Küche mit Warmwasser. Außerdem gibt es auch einen schönen Sportpark. Lagerfeuer und eine kostenlose BBQ Ecke. Ein Schwimmbecken für Kinder ist ebenfalls vorhanden.
Literally stayed in mud! I understand no one can control the weather, but at least lower your prices for the sites without a concrete slab.
Great BIG4 tourist park with excellent slab sites, facilities are brilliant, fantastic hot showers with good water pressure, BBQs, Camp Kitchen, Games Room and Fire Pit

We booked the drive through site, it was a mud pit. Drive throughs I have booked at other locations have been on slabs and level. Nothing to see in this location, amenities are clean though. Service was non existent at check in.
Friendly, helpful people, good if you like fishing. The sites are a little bit 'squishy', but not too bad

We loved our 3 night stay here during the school holidays.  The park had everything to keep the kids entertained, jumping pillow,  games room (with free arcade games), playground,  gokarts, pool (unheated but my kids still had a crack in winter), movie nights and communal camp fire. The jetty is a nice walk,  staff super friendly.  Small town,  but my kids were busy every day in the park.
Lovely spot.  drive through sites. amenities very clean and updated

Stayed at an ensuite site. A little tight to get the caravan in. The ensuite was clean and had everything you needed including towels which was lovely. The staff were very friendly. Lovely evening stroll along the old Jetty. Plenty of things for the kids to do as well.
Very clean and comfortable Garden Unit. Friendly staff, well appointed and well kept park.

We stayed here for a night 9.7.2025 , we stayed in cabin 26,  very nice modern cabin with everything U need ,  with a big deck and seats out the back of the cabin .  Just an idea  but a bbq on the rear deck would be awesome .  A nice car space for your car and camper trailer if U want a night of no hassles .

Only thing I couldn't work out was does the fan in the bedroom 2 closest to the back door work without the light having to be on ?. I tried and couldn't work it out.

4.5 stars outta 5 .
Loved it! 😁 🥰🤗

We held a large camp out  group 25 people
The vibe of the place worked really well with our group a large meeting area
Camp kitchen lovely and well kept
The amenities clean and well kept
Wake up to an espresso from the coffee cart located on site
Caretakers are just that care takers
They supplied the wood for our fire and kept check on our needs
Well done we will definitely be back for a dip in that pool
Bloody good getaway

Absolutely outstanding!
We honestly couldn’t rate this park higher. The lady at reception was so warm and helpful. We found ourselves stuck in Sydney at a not-so-great van park and needed somewhere to stay last minute, late at night, on our way home to QLD. Karuah Big 4 went out of their way to fit us in and check us in after hours — we were so grateful.

The grounds are pristine and absolutely beautiful. The showers and amenities were spotless, and there’s a peaceful, natural feel that instantly makes you feel at home.

We’ll definitely be back — hopefully for a much longer stay next time. 5 stars!
Great caravan park in a superb location. The Jetty is a popular attraction. Good fishing!
Clean, quiet and not too expensive.

Very small e suite powered site.
Not easy trying to reverse van in.

Stayed one night. It had been raining and asked for a drive through powered sites. Was put on a site where our  wheels sunk onto the mud. Asked for another site with concrete but was told non was available.even though there was to across the road. We joined Big 4 so we would get  more privelages who  ever this is not the case.
Room was great. Basic but clean. Bed was really comfy and the morning stroll to the jetty was beautiful. Brilliant location

Great spot to camp. Plenty to do for the whole family. The park has a game room,pool, jumping pillow & cafe. Daily activities for the kids are well organised, movies on a big screen each night and a fire pit out back. The jetty is around 80-100m long and it a great spot to fish…
Lastly a 10min walk to the local RSL, IGA, pizza joint & bottlo ..

You have to pass throught the kitchen to go to the toilets. Very small toilet block.
Very small kitchen also with just 1 sink (i had to wait in line every time) and no gas to cook....... !just barbecues.....
First time I find such a poor camp kitchen in 2 months travelling
Park is ok quiet and nice surroundings around the lake , amenities are clean.
Accomodation is very well kept and the staff a super friendly - highly recommend!!

Wants to make a review to make sure others know how clean and nicely furnished cabin 6 was. Lovely open plan, with a large TV screen.
The shower was 10/10.
I have had a great 5 nights sleep. I stayed in the twin room in a single bed and the bed was very comfortable.
There is care upon the presentation of the grounds. There’s gardeners and maintenance workers about on a daily basis. The grounds is very well kept.
Great location if you want to use the jetty and be by the water. Nice calming atmosphere, lovely surprise seeing the wild bunnies hopping about. Thank you BIG4 Karuah , was a wonderful stay.

Had a blast getting to stay here! Staff are extremely friendly and the facilities are a ton of fun. I really enjoyed going in the giant pillow and swimming in the pool. Can’t wait till next time Karuah!!!

We’ve spent the last 6 days at the Big4 Karuah Jetty Holiday Park & it has been an incredible experience - we’ll be sad to leave. The staff are super friendly and attentive - the amenities are all well kept & the cabins are beautiful with everything you need! Tip: make sure you catch the sunrise from the jetty - it won’t disappoint! Thanks again - hope to be back again soon! 🫶🏽

The bathroom in the cabin is ridiculous. The towel rail and the sink face each other so closely you can barely get between them to reach the toilet. There are no flat surfaces on which to place your toilet bag and no hooks on which to place your clothes.

We had one bedside table for three beds. No tissues, no alarm clock, no bedside lights, it's very Spartan. No power points next to the bed either.

There's a small dining table and three uncomfortable metal chairs. There's also a two seater lounge, for three people. There's a lot of wasted space in the cabin.

The kitchen is ok, full size fridge, cooktop and microwave, no oven. Jug and toaster hiding in the cupboard. There's just enough cutlery, crockery and glasses for three people, but no surplus.

The WiFi is useless, it's slower than dialup. No Netflix or anything like that. Optus mobile reception is marginal too, if you're bringing your own.

The park shop has no food, apart from milk. It's all just chips and lollies. The pool is nice and there's one tennis court. There's a TV room with some cheesy game machines and an air hockey table. Naturally the TV remote is mia. There's plenty of space at least.

The Wharf is getting ready to collapse, you can still walk out along it, but watch your step. Good spot for fishing and crabbing.

There's a courtesy bus to the RSL available, which could also be used to reach the IGA supermarket (shuts at 4pm). You can walk into town, if you're in no hurry, it's only a km or so.

The grounds are generally well kept. Not much in the way of visitor parking. Good luck reaching the code pad from your car to open the gate. There's a coffee cart, haven't seen it open yet.

Amazing service by grace such a lovely & wonderful person to deal with even the after hrs person was plesent. Booked last minute & she was so kind to have given a discount,every phone call I made  she was so happy & answered with a smile. The cabin was clean & new, kitchen was very conveniently stocked with crockery, cutlery & electricals. My kids loved fishing on the jetty & eating the local seafood an absolut gem hidden away can't wait to go back.

Our stay is unfortunately not a good one we are covered with sandlfes bites  so badly infected we are booked for two weeks at the ensuite site but had to live a week earlier Our caravan also damage due to the site was very uneven concrete drive way it's not a good experience at all I'm so sad to write this review but people need to know so they can make their own mind if they want to experience like what we experience

We had noise every night
Until 0200am at least for 4 nights
Very disappointing
Apart from that and having to wait to use the toilet one morning
Great place Great park staff very friendly and would stay here again

A warm welcome from the manager including dog treats for my dog. Coded boom gates led to our site which was a drive through close to reception. The amenities were only a short walk, were very clean and I loved the hot shower. There's a camp kitchen, pool, jumping pillow and tennis court. We enjoyed a stroll at night to the jetty, to enjoy the views and river breezes. The caravan park is only a short distance off the highway so perfect for a rest night or great for a longer holiday.
Great place for weekend getaway
Fantastic staff, made everyone feel welcome and our dogs. Special mention to Leigh, who went out of her way to make you feel welcome. Only need a recycling bin for more than cans.
Our stay was again wonderful we had the best  time kids enjoyed themselves the toilet block were so clean and looked after we will be back again
Very nice holiday park. Well maintained, great pool, amenities are well kept. The games room is amazing too.

We decided to stay at a "Big 4" as we thought a certain standard came with it. Cannot understand how this place gets 4 stars.
Caravan sites are a patch of dirt; the amenities are not clean; the water in the pool is opaque in colour; and there is lots of rubbish on the ground everywhere.
Great spot. Clean amenities and staff friendly

브리즈번에서 시드니 가는중  1박
키친깨끗.샤워시설 수압좋음
부두가 있음 토끼 뛰어다님 . 파리가좀 성가심.
대체적으로 만족했음

Great place to stay. Great discounts offered
. The best thing is my doggo is welcome as much as I am.
Not enough towels only 4 for 6 people. Rooms were small but comfortable.

I had blast there with my mum and 8 year old brother had fun he the pool was fun. Garden unit small profit for 3 people. the RSL club was good go karts where fun. kids activities where good the staff are nice. This place is the best we will come back he soon. And also we went to the jetty and it was low tide we caught crabs. there were bunnies every one we called it daisy Because it had baby.
Multiple trips to this amazing holidays park
Good service
It is a very good place for fishing and relaxing with family and friends
Very nice caravan park.  I stayed overnight in my motorhome. Very clean facilities

Good slab sites and amenities. Great little club up the road. We brought a tinny with us thinking we could use the park ramp. There is only water at high tide and you have to use the boat ramp in town.
Nice and clean, plenty of showers, great for kids, RSL just down the road.
Very nice clean park, new caravan sites are concreted and easy to park. It is also dog friendly

We stayed here for a week recently and it was very pleasant all around. The rabbits, lorikeets that perched on the villa railing, the crabs and the ibis and kookaburras were all putting on a bit of a show for the week, which was perfect as it was my partner's first visit to Australia.

The villa was really very good, it was very clean, the shower was nice and having somewhere to hang clothing was great, though some more hangers provided would be great.

The bed wasn't the -most- comfortable, but neither were we expecting them to be.

The staff were all friendly, the facilities were all clean, the playground was a lot of fun for our daughter.

Our only complaints were that the wifi is next to useless, we couldn't stay connected, so streaming services, work emails and even messages and calls weren't possible. If we stayed again we would bring our own mobile internet. Also, the laundry room was a tiny bit frustrating in that we went up after the office was closed, not realising it only took dollar coins or twenty cent pieces, and we had other coins. Partner insisted on trying other coins, and machine ate them. We didn't bother following that up though. Had to walk up to the local IGA to switch it out for as many coins as they could give me - having a coin machine would have made life easier, but we got there in the end! The machines were big and cleaned and dried everything well.

Coming and going was fine, the park was almost always quiet except for two nights when the next villa over appeared to have a party of some kind and had someone running back and forth a lot.

All in all, we would definitely stay again, and would recommend staying here if you want somewhere peaceful and clean, close to the water without a lot of people being disruptive!
Camp rabbit was a highlight, I called miss marble and eventually found the camp bin , but did locate another bin eventually
Just an o'night stop this time, great cabin, will stay again.

Stayed for 4 days on à powered site. New sites being developed
Great place to relax.
We had a great time. The kids loved it!

Not up to BIG4 standard , couldn't even get out today because of malfunctioning keypads , when i did get out i could not get back in this has been going on all week  . Drainage on the grass powered sites needs to be addressed, after some heavy rain it's just a mud pit . To charge big 4 prices for this is a joke .

Took the van up thought the drive through sites were quite large and spacious as per the photos on the website,  we went for the weekend and had to park so close to our neighbours that they couldn't even put their awning out.

So happy with our stay with our camper trailer and very happy with this parks location, meaning it's very in the middle of nowhere and so peaceful. But less than an hours drive to a mall or things to do.
You can hire pedal parts at the park, which our 3yo loved. And the Jetty is so pretty.
The amenities and camp kitchen are ALL kept so clean and there's a little games room but we loved the projector that they played movies on every night. And a communal fire pit.
The Pool is Friendly and the jumping pillow is fun. Didnt feet the chance to play tennis or volleyball. But it's awesome they're available.

stayed here for a family/ birthday weekend we had 3 cabins all next to each other
cabins where great!! clean and everything you needed. Park was neat and tidy staff friendly, lots of things to keep the kids happy we will definitely be back thanks for making our stay away such a memorable one!

The biggest shock we have had in a while.  We didn't expect country hospitality this close to big cities.  They make you feel special.  WELL worth the stay.  The deluxe cabin for 6 was fantastic.  Photos depict the long jetty to keep the boat, a muddy caught, and my pug enjoying his room. YES, pooch friendly

The park is nice and quiet
The Jetty is pretty popular for people fishing and just enjoying the view
I liked the balcony which was off my room and we used it both days a lot!
IGA and Bottle Shop are just up the road with the RSL opposite so everything is close by
Nice easy relaxing weekend away
Only reason I wouldn’t stay again is I think $600 for 2 nights is a bit expensive
Great family park.
Villa so clean, staff fantastic and service. Loved it and relaxing

We recently had a 8 night stay, on a powered site and in-laws in a cabin. We have returned home completely riddled with bug bites as the bugs are absolutely ridiculous - nothing would help.
We also found the park quite unorganised.
We were given a code to access the grounds, amenities and pool area, however it never worked. The code was then changed twice while we were there, thankfully other guests told us as the staff didn’t make us aware, yet texted us about pool parties. During our stay we enjoyed a food truck and live band, unfortunately state the camp kitchen and bathrooms were left in was quite disgusting and unusable really and they stayed like that for most of the day after. After an event like that we felt that those areas should’ve been made a priority to clean the following day; knowing the event they hosted. During our stay we also wanted the utilise the laundry, to find that 3 outve the 4 washing machines were outve order and the one that did work was extremely dodgy. The cabin was quite nice - exactly what the in-laws needed, however the outdoor furniture definitely needs an upgrade as the chairs were so unstable and cracked.
it saddens me to leave a review like this - we love to stay at big 4s and do so quite often but unfortunately we will not be returning here.
Over all good experience camping site is very hard dry sand rock so you must needed heavy screw type pags

Nice, clean amenities. We have arrived late in the dark and the staff gave us an easy drive thru site. Need to be careful at the bumm gate with a caravan as it is a sharp turn into the camping. Code needed for amenities and for getting in and out from camping.
Awesome people make all of the difference

Had a great time here. We were camped near multiple bbq facilities, the shower block and pool were all only metres away. They ran activities for the younger children and had a movie on each night. Some of the bbqs could of been a bit hotter but you soon learn which ones to use and the pool water was a little warm.
We did have a bit of a altercation with our camp neighbours unfortunately but not the parks fault and they handled it well.

We stayed here on an unpowered site with our camper-van and as far as campsites in Australia go, this is the most expensive and the worst. Not only is the place really unkempt and quite unclean, it’s also incredibly under facilitated. There are two showers for this side of the entire camp ground, and the cooking facilities are extremely basic.
They either need to lower the price drastically or invest generously.
First and last visit without a shadow of a doubt!
Great place for camping with little ones. Toddler pool was perfect as was the playground.

Bit expensive but we had pleasant stay though. Kids had fun on the pool, playground and fitness area, has a tiny camp kitchen. Staffs are friendly. Short distance to shops and parks. We stayed on the campsite and the grass was bit tall, you cannot easily what’s on the grass, we were surprised what’s hidden on it when we are packing our tents because pets are allowed. 🤢

Not my cup of tea but we visited friends camped here. Nice pool, jumping pillow for kids, playground needs shade, good activity room for kids. Electric bbq's. Seemed pretty packed in but sites are quite large.
Great place to spend family Christmas!
Great service, good location. The local shops were not of a high standard of customer service.
Quiet park, very clean and tidy cabins. Close to shops and club. Staff are friendly and welcoming. Will definitely be back.
Best last minute getaway we've been on, the cabin was super clean oven Was spotless ans service was amazing thank you
Had a drive through powered site, close to amenities. Lovely well cared for park, recommend stopping over.

So just drove from the Fraser Coast to Jervis Bay and back staying in caravan parks. And guess what....Karuah Big 4 was the most expensive. Way over the top.....never again!!!! Price gouging....mmmm, I wonder?
Mud van sites. Not enough amenities to match the amount of sites.
Great place to stay, priced well and great facilities
Really loved our short stay here and enjoyed the walk out to the jetty. The after hours service was fantastic and I thank the staff member who called in advance to let us know where to find the key.

Had an overnight stay. We were placed on a "grassed" power site. It was more like a dust bowl. Plenty of better sites they could have put us on . Even worse is it rained overnight so the dust turned into mud by the morning.
Stopover stay from Gold Coast to Sydney.  Spacious clean cabin and quiet surrounds.

Loved the stay!
There are a lot of activities for kids to enjoy!

The cabins were disappointingly dim, with cobwebs and bugs, contrary to the advertised cleanliness. Park facilities were dilapidated, not as promised online. The jetty had unstable, broken planks, making it unsafe for kids and the elderly. Neglected gardens added to the unsatisfactory experience. Despite our group of family and friends hiring four cabins after traveling interstate, our stay was cut short due to these issues. However, the receptionist was understanding and apologetic, suggesting this wasn’t their first encounter with such complaints
Haven't stayed here
The place was amazing 😍🤩. The rooms were very beautiful and hygienic. There was an amazing pool, Park, Jumping pillow and there was even a Go-kart hire.
A good spot for a few nights.

Nous avions un emplacement avec électricité pour un campervan.
Super camping familial
Douches et wc très propres
Very clean and spacious cabin! Short stroll to the water and pier with beautiful views!
Good sized sites, clean amenities,  friendly staff.  Short drive to shops and club.
Often call in here with the usual friendly service.
A bare powered caravan site for $75.00 is a bit over the top.

We have just spent a week at The Big 4 Karuah Jetty Holiday Park. We also have a small dog "beautifully behaved" 😊 who was also made most welcome.This is truly the most beautifully run Park. All staff are so friendly and the amenities are so clean!!!!
Highly recommend to anyone and personally can't wait to stay again. Well done guys 💙

We have stayed at big 4 karuah twice now and we will be back again. Lots of facilities for kids and we loved being able to take the dog. We especially enjoyed the coffee van, which had good coffee and very friendly service.
A quiet, convenient caravan park in beautiful Karuah. Very clean, dog-friendly cabins a short walk to salt marsh, mangroves and jetty.

The camp is so nice. We have stayed in the ensuite powered site. The ensuite was so clean. The holiday activities and all facilities kept all the kids entertained. Thank you Cassie and all the crews for the excellent services. We will absolutely come back.
Beautiful location, with clean accommodation and very friendly staff.
We all had fun. It is nice park. Had a fire 🔥 place, which was amazing and also kids played free games and watched movie at night
Top spot. We are return campers.
